name: Light Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Fresh mint or 1/2 teaspoon Dried mint
3/4 teaspoon Fresh basil or 1/4 teaspoon Dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the unpeeled red potatoes until tender.
2. Chop celery, dill pickles, sweet red peppers, onion, and fresh parsley.
3. In a bowl, combine the cooked potatoes, chopped vegetables, and mint.
4. Combine plain low-fat yogurt, lemon juice, honey, dry mustard, basil (fresh or dried), and pepper in a separate bowl.
5. Pour the dressing mixture over the potato salad and mix gently.
6. Cover the bowl and chill for several hours before serving.
